articles.description: Listen to BBC Radio 5 Live commentary, follow live text and score updates and match stats as West Ham United take on Brentford in the fifth round of the FA Cup.
articles.title: FA Cup fifth round LIVE:  West Ham United host Brentford - radio commentary, text & score updates and match stats

articles.description: The Miami Dolphins are to release quarterback Tua Tagovailoa, which will cost them a record dead cap hit of $99.2m (£74.2m).
articles.title: Tua Tagovailoa: Miami Dolphins to release quarterback and suffer NFL record dead cap hit

articles.description: After three straight defeats and a backline overhaul for the loss to Italy, England head coach Steve Borthwick may make major changes for the trip to France.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Steve Borthwick - four big calls that could revive England

articles.description: League One Port Vale's reward for beating Sunderland in the FA Cup is a quarter-final tie away to Chelsea, while Manchester City will host Liverpool in a heavyweight showdown.
articles.title: FA Cup quarter-final draw: Man City host Liverpool and Port Vale go to Chelsea

articles.description: Major League Soccer gives lifetime bans to midfielder Derrick Jones and winger Yaw Yeboah for betting offences.
articles.title: MLS gives lifetime bans to midfielder Derrick Jones and winger Yaw Yeboah for betting offences

articles.description: After ugly scenes at Sunday's Old Firm derby, what do we know about the fan clashes and what could happen next?
articles.title: Old Firm chaos: What happened? Who said what? What now?

articles.description: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Max Verstappen will tick off one of his "bucket list" events when he drives in May's Nurburgring 24-Hours endurance race.
articles.title: Formula 1: Max Verstappen to compete in 24-hour Nurburgring race

articles.description: Concern has grown for team after one critic called them 'wartime traitors' for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem.
articles.title: Five Iranian footballers granted Australian visas after anthem protest

articles.description: Paul Scholes says an Instagram story post about Manchester United interim head coach Michael Carrick was "in no way intended to be offensive" towards his former team-mate.
articles.title: Manchester United: Paul Scholes did not intend to offend Michael Carrick

articles.description: Jack Draper will continue his Indian Wells defence against Novak Djokovic while Cameron Norrie also claims a third-round win on Monday.
articles.title: Indian Wells: Jack Draper to face Novak Djokovic in fourth round while Cameron Norrie also through
